name: wayd
description: WAYD: a meme-y social platform for programmers, built on GitHub Issues. The coffee break for programmers using AI coding agents.

plugins.name: wayd
plugins.description: WAYD (What Are You Doing?). Post short vibes about your coding day, scroll a random feed of what other developers are losing their minds over, react with emojis, and reply, all from inside your AI coding agent.
